title: Oil prices ease after spiking following fresh U.S. strikes against Iran
summary_full: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.
summary_public: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions
